title: PBMC Isolation from apheresis collars with SepMate tubes
author: Girija Goyal

steps_raw.instruction: Cut cone from collar and place on 50mL conical tube. Cut the top end to release blood and allow it to drip into the tube
Dilute blood collected from apheresis collar with equal volume RPMI or PBS. Mix well.

Use a 50ml SepMate tube and follow manufacturer's directions for density centrifugation SepMate™-50 (IVD) 100 Tubes STEMCELL Technologies Inc. Catalog #85450 Lymphoprep™ 250 mL STEMCELL Technologies Inc. Catalog #7801
Collect the white layer of cells just above the plastic insert into a final volume of 20 ml of media or buffer. Limit the amount of Lymphoprep that is harvested. Mix well.
Centrifuge at 300 g for 5 minutes. 00:05:00, Centrifugation
Aspirate media and resuspend cells in 20 mL media/buffer depending on next steps. undetermined, Warm media
Dilute 100x by adding 10ul cell solutions to 890 ul media/buffer and 100ul of Trypan blue undetermined, Cell solution undetermined, Media/buffer undetermined, Trypan blue

Count cells using a hemocytometer. Count the number of cells in each of the four quadrants. Use the following formula to find the total number of cells. Cells/ml = cells counted*dilution factor*104cells/4
Cells can be kept in solution in the refrigerator for up to two hours.
